DesperationLevel.description:
POPULATION: Evacuated
Conditions: Industrial landscape with small landmasses.
FAUNA: Dangerous, Invasive species.

ThallasicLevel.description:
Population: Abandoned
Conditions: A small tropical moon with bright weather and diverse wildlife.

NephriteLevel.description:
Population: Lost
Conditions: A vast, crystallized moon with dangerous monsters

ReignLevel.description:
Population: Abandoned
Conditions: Treacherous frozen mountains. Watch your step.
Fauna: Diverse and aggressive species.

SolitudeLevel.description:
Population: Abandoned.
Conditions: A dry wasteland moon. Ocassional Oasises
Fauna: Diverse and aggressive species.

SymbiosisLevel.description:
Population: Abandoned.
Conditions: A dreary, muddy and bog-like moon.
Fauna: Diverse and aggressive species.

VeldLevel.description:
Population: Failed.
Conditions: Large, forested moon with consistent weather.
Fauna: Diverse and aggressive species.

FlickerLevel.description:
POPULATION: Missing
CONDITIONS: Decrepit facilities and Thick forests.
FAUNA: Humans detected near landing zones.

The IrisLevel.description:
POPULATION: It is with us now.
CONDITIONS: Laughing at us.
FAUNA: Behold

LamentLevel.description:
POPULATION: Missing
CONDITIONS: Coastal forestlines and high winds
FAUNA: Unknown

PareidoliaLevel.description:
POPULATION: Lost contact
CONDITIONS: Verdant Mesas, cold winds blow through abandoned industrial facilities
FAUNA: Local wildlife hunted to extinction.

RetinueLevel.description:
POPULATION: Abandoned
CONDITIONS: Arid. Thick haze, worsensed by previously used train locomotion.
FAUNA: Several species trapped within caved in facilities.

AttenuationLevel.description:
POPULATION: Abandoned
CONDITIONS: Weathered and mountainous terrain. Its canyons were previously mined for resources.
FAUNA: Canyon ecosystem supports dormant species. High Protista and Theraposa activity.

VolitionLevel.description:
POPULATION: Unknown
CONDITIONS: Expansive hills. Frequent storms. Unidentified structures detected.
FAUNA: Not enough data to evaluate. Presumed teeming with life.

DetritusLevel.description:
POPULATION: Abandoned
CONDITIONS: Desolate, made of Amethyst. Previously operated as a workyard.
FAUNA: Biological life detected to not originate from Detritus.

BorealLevel.description:
POPULATION: Missing
CONDITIONS: Low Temperature. Further details unknown.
FAUNA: Local fauna data empty.

CalamitousLevel.description:
POPULATION: None
CONDITIONS: Scorching heat. Thin atmosphere. 
FAUNA: Nocturnal and ground dwelling life.

IncalescenceLevel.description:
POPULATION: Abandoned
CONDITIONS: Scorching heat. failing infrastructure.
FAUNA: Unknown.

PrecipiceLevel.description:
POPULATION: None.
CONDITIONS: Steep cliffs. Dense clouds. 
FAUNA: Unknown.

RampartLevel.description:
POPULATION: Infected.
CONDITIONS: Humid. Unknown Location of Entrance.
FAUNA: A competitive ecosystem supports aggressive lifeforms.

TenebrousLevel.description:
POPULATION: Unknown
CONDITIONS: No land masses. Continual storms.
FAUNA: Unknown

VerdanceLevel.description:
POPULATION: Abandoned
CONDITIONS: Humid. Rough terrain. Teeming with plant-life. 
Water runs through local cave system. Rains commonly.
FAUNA: A competitive ecosystem supports aggressive lifeforms.

WitherLevel.description:
POPULATION: Abandoned
CONDITIONS: Small forests surrounded by desert. Abstract structures dot its surface.
FAUNA: Isolated ecosystem home to dangerous forms of life.

AcheronLevel.description:
POPULATION: None
CONDITIONS: A frozen volcanic moon, with obsidian-like formations as its surface
FAUNA: Mostly underground activity

BilgeLevel.description:
POPULATION - Abandoned
CONDITIONS - A flooded moon, where high tides wash away any signs of life
FAUNA - Few aggressive specimen remain, hiding from water

DeadlockLevel.description:
POPULATION - Replaced
CONDITIONS - A gas giant, home to a massive automative factory with autonomous railway systems
FAUNA - None

KanieLevel.description:
POPULATION - Forced out
CONDITIONS - Harsh climate, heavy breathable air
FAUNA -  Several species detected, mostly hostile

ChronosLevel.description:
CONDITIONS: Dense fog obscures the snowy peremiter. Time Anomalies have been detected on the moon's surface.
FAUNA: Unknown

NoctisLevel.description:
POPULATION - Lost contact several weeks ago
CONDITIONS - Pitch black perpetual night covers the celestials' grey surface
FAUNA - Aggresive creatures roaming in the darkness

TerraLevel.description:
POPULATION - Never settled
CONDITIONS - Rocky, jagged terrain with massive stone structures
FAUNA - Climate supports wide variety of creatures of various danger

BozorosLevel.description:
POPULATION: Sparse.
CONDITIONS: Colorful and bright. It smells like cotton candy here?
FAUNA: Ecosystem likely to induce hysterical laughter.

OxydeLevel.description:
—-----------------------------
POPULATION: 378 Crews
CONDITIONS: Warm and dusty planet, dust storms plague its oxidised surface.
HISTORY: Used as a company mining site, bustling with crew activity. Oxyde’s core is one of the richest mineral deposits in the system. Hundreds of quarries litter its surface.

AdamanceLevel.description:
POPULATION: Abandoned
CONDITIONS: A landscape of deep valleys and mountains.
FAUNA: Home to a lively, diverse ecosystem of smaller-sized omnivores.

ArtificeLevel.description:
POPULATION: None
CONDITIONS: Waning forests. Abandoned facilities littered across the landscape.
FAUNA: Rumored active machinery left behind.

AssuranceLevel.description:
POPULATION: Abandoned
CONDITIONS: Jagged and weathered terrain. 
FAUNA: Ecosystem supports territorial behaviour.

CompanyBuildingLevel.description:
POPULATION: Unknown
CONDITIONS: No land masses. Continual storms.
FAUNA: Unknown
Where the Company resides.

DineLevel.description:
POPULATION: None
CONDITIONS: Frozen, rocky. Its planet orbits a white dwarf star.
FAUNA: Unlikely for complex life to exist

EmbrionLevel.description:
POPULATION: Abandoned
CONDITIONS: Desolate, made of amethyst.
FAUNA: Embrion is devoid of biological life.

ExperimentationLevel.description:
POPULATION: Abandoned
CONDITIONS: Arid. Thick haze, worsened by industrial artifacts.
FAUNA: Dominated by a few species.

LiquidationLevel.description:
POPULATION: None
CONDITIONS: Previously mined for its rich industrial resources, Liquidation is now largely an ocean moon.
FAUNA:

FAUNA: Diverse

CONDITIONS: Frozen, rocky. Its planet orbits a white dwarf star.

TitanLevel.description:
POPULATION: None
CONDITIONS: Frozen, rocky. This moon was mined for resources. It's easy to get lost here.
FAUNA: Dangerous entities have been rumored to take residence in the vast network of tunnels.

CONDITIONS: Humid. Rough terrain. Teeming with plant-life.
